ddls:
CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart (e.g., Hot 100, UK Singles Chart) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the music chart */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the chart is applicable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chart was last updated */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., weekly, monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist performing the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the song in minutes and seconds */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the song contains explicit content */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of plays */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Total number of downloads */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the song's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the artist */,
  "debut_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist debuted */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank record */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being ranked */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the song is on */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the rank record */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the song on the chart */,
  "last_week" INTEGER /* Rank of the song last week */,
  "peak_rank" INTEGER /* Peak rank achieved by the song */,
  "weeks_on_board" INTEGER /* Total weeks the song has been on the chart */,
  "chart_position_change" INTEGER /* Change in chart position compared to the previous week */,
  "rank_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the rank (e.g., based on data accuracy) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rank was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_ranks_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_ranks_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was created */,
  "privacy_setting" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (e.g., public, private) */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the playlist is collaborative */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-song association */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the song to the playlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the song was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_added_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("added_by_user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the user (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user profile was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playlists" (
  "user_playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-playlist association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the playlist (e.g., owner, collaborator) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-playlist association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., play, add_to_playlist) */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target (song or playlist) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the action (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the action was performed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., social media, email) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience of the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_songs" (
  "campaign_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign-song association */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being promoted */,
  "promotion_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion for the song */,
  "promotion_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion for the song */,
  "promotion_status" TEXT /* Status of the promotion (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign-song association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_songs_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the metric relates to */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metrics were recorded */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views on the social media platform */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate calculated from likes, shares, and comments */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_metrics_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trending_songs" (
  "trending_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trending record */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being tracked */,
  "trend_score" REAL /* Score indicating the trend level of the song */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend score was calculated */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend (e.g., chart, social media) */,
  "trend_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the trend (e.g., viral, marketing campaign) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trending_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trending_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)
